title: Koniag’s 2020 Elder of the Year Announced
summary: Congratulations to our 2020 Koniag Elder of the Year, June Pardue! June was nominated by our Shareholder committees. The nomination said, “she is a renowned Alutiiq and Inupiaq artist from Kodiak Island. She is a very active traditional artist, mentor, and is very active in the community.”… Source

title: Koniag’s 2020 Youth of the Year Award- Bayley Rowland
summary: Congratulations to the 2020 Koniag Youth of the Year to Bayley Rowland! title: 2020 Dividend and Elder Benefit Amounts Declared
Chugach Ranks Fifth In Alaskan-Owned Businesses
summary: As in year’s past, the announce was made at Alaska Business’s Top 49ers celebration. COVID-19 pushed the prestigious luncheon to a virtual format.
